response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a seasoned polyglot engineer with genuine depth in full-stack and high-throughput systems work, but his resume reveals no meaningful experience in the core technical domain this role requires: experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, rollout-risk management, or telemetry and metrics infrastructure. The Principal/IC6 level further demands demonstrated cross-team platform ownership and growth engineering leadership, neither of which surfaces in his work history. His trajectory reads as a strong individual contributor across diverse delivery domains rather than a platform-builder driving multi-team experimentation and measurement strategy.
strengths: 14+ years of engineering across high-throughput distributed systems, embedded, mobile, and web — including millions of HTTP requests per second at Sociomantic
Broad polyglot background covering TypeScript, C++, C#, Java, and DLang, which partially overlaps with the required language set
Staff-level and open-source platform leadership (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial) demonstrating ability to own and ship foundational tooling
concerns: No evidence of experimentation platform design, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management — the central technical competency of this role
No telemetry infrastructure, metrics pipelines, or statistical/data analysis experience visible anywhere in the resume despite these being explicitly required
Current and recent roles are senior/staff-level delivery work, not Principal-level cross-team platform ownership or growth engineering strategy

key_factors.factor: No experimentation or measurement platform experience
No telemetry or metrics infrastructure background
High-throughput distributed systems work at Sociomantic
